assertions.description: INCORRECT: bus_analysis.uart contains 8 entries for nets named TX1+, TX1-, RX1+, RX1-, TX2+, TX2-, RX2+, RX2-. These are SuperSpeed USB differential pair names on a USB4/USB3 adapter (USB-C to USB-A/DisplayPort), not UART signals. The naming follows the USB-C connector specification (Txn+/Txn- are SuperSpeed transmit lanes). All entries have empty 'devices' arrays, confirming these are passthrough connector pins with no UART IC involved. The UART detector is triggering on TX/RX substrings in standard USB-C pin names.
